title: cert_verify_and_cache_leaf_pubkey returns raw KeyId with no RAII helper
description: cert_verify_and_cache_leaf_pubkey returns a KeyId and documents 'caller is responsible for evicting'. Every other key-producing API in this crate uses a with_xxx_key closure pattern that guarantees eviction. A new contributor, following the dominant pattern, will expect a with_cert_pubkey helper and will be confused when none exists. Callers who forget the manual key_evict leak HSM cache slots; HSM RAM cache exhaustion will manifest as spurious errors in unrelated operations, making the root cause non-obvious.
